title: The Indian Veterinary Council Act, 1984
full_text: The Indian Veterinary Council Act, 1984 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198452 Act Number: 52 Enactment Date: 1984-08-18 Act Year: 1984 Short Title: The Indian Veterinary Council Act, 1984 Long Title: An Act to regulate veterinary practice and to provide, for that purpose, for the establishment of a Veterinary Council of India and State Veterinary Councils and the maintenance of registers of the veterinary practitioners and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare Department: Department of Animal Husbandry and Dairying Enforcement Date: 18-08-1984 Notification: yet to be notified Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Indian Veterinary Council Act, 1984 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II INDIAN VETERINARY COUNCIL CHAPTER III INDIAN VETERINARY PRACTITIONERS REGISTER CHAPTER IV PRIVILEGES OF REGISTERED VETERINARY PRACTITIONERS CHAPTER V DISCIPLINE CHAPTER VI STATE VETERINARY COUNCILS CHAPTER VII REGISTRATION CHAPTER VIII MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short titles, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Establishment and composition of the Council. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Mode of election of members. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Term of office of President, Vice-President and members. Section 6. Cessation of membership. Section 7. Casual vacancies. Section 8. Resignation. Section 9. Meetings of the Council. Section 10. Vacancies in the Council not to invalidate acts, etc. Section 11. Appointment of Secretary and other officers or servants. Section 12. Executive Committee and other Committees. Section 13. Fees and allowances. Section 14. Information to be furnished by the Council and publication thereof. Section 15. Recognition of veterinary qualifications granted by veterinary institutions in India. Show Related Subordinates Section 16. Recognition of veterinary qualifications granted by veterinary institutions in countries with which there is a scheme of reciprocity. Section 17. Special provisions in certain cases for recognition of veterinary qualifications granted by veterinary institutions in countries with which there is no scheme of reciprocity. Section 18. Power to require information as to courses of study and examinations. Section 19. Inspection of veterinary institutions and examinations. Show Related Subordinates Section 20. Appointment of visitors. Show Related Subordinates Section 21. Withdrawal of recognition. Show Related Subordinates Section 22. Minimum standards of veterinary education. Show Related Subordinates Section 23. Indian veterinary practitioners register. Section 24. Registration in the Indian veterinary practitioners register. Section 25. Issue of certificate of registration. Section 26. Registration of additional qualifications. Section 27. Removal of names from the Indian veterinary practitioners register. Section 28. Person enrolled on Indian veterinary practitioners register to notify change of place of residence or practice. Section 29. Privileges of persons, who are enrolled on the Indian veterinary practitioners register. Section 30. Right of persons who are enrolled on the Indian veterinary practitioners register. Section 31. Professional conduct. Show Related Subordinates Section 32. Establishment and composition of State Veterinary Councils. Section 33. Inter-State agreements. Section 34. Composition of Joint State Veterinary Councils. Section 35. Incorporation of State Veterinary Councils. Section 36. President. Section 37. Mode of elections. Section 38. Terms of office and causal vacancies. Section 39. Resignation. Section 40. Executive and other Committees. Section 41. Fees and allowances. Section 42. Appointment of Registrar and other officers or servants. Section 43. Information to be furnished by State Veterinary Council. Section 44. Preparation and maintenance of State veterinary practitioners register. Section 45. First preparation of register. Section 46. Qualifications for entry on preparation of register. Section 47. Scrutiny of applications for registration. Section 48. Renewal fees. Section 49. Removal from the register. Section 50. Restoration to State veterinary register. Section 51. Printing of State veterinary register. Section 52. Transfer of registration. Section 53. Bar of jurisdiction. Section 54. Issue of duplicate certificates. Section 55. Penalty for falsely claiming to be registered. Section 56. Misuse of titles. Section 57. Practice by unregistered persons. Section 58. Failure to surrender certificate of registration. Section 59. Cognizance of offence. Section 60. Bar of suit and other legal proceedings. Section 61. Payment of part of fees to Council. Section 62. Accounts and audit. Section 63. Appointment of Commission of Inquiry. Section 64. Power of Central Government to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 65. Power of State Government to make rules. Section 66. Power to make regulations. Show Related Subordinates Section 67. Repeal and saving. Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE.
